Forty-Fifth Account And Report Of Trustee; Petition For Settlement And Approval Of Accounts; And For Compensation
Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Boessenecker, via Zoom, for Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., Trustee.

The court queries counsel regarding why the accounting shows that there is $13,087.92 in cash and the account statement shows $75.01.

Counsel is uncertain regarding the court's query and requests a continuance to determine why the numbers above are inconsistent.

The matter is continued to Sep-26-2022 at 9:00 in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
